changes.summary: Switched from per-seat subscription to pay-as-you-go token-based pricing. Teams can add Codex-only seats billed on token consumption with no rate limits. ChatGPT Business price cut from $25 to $20/month (annual). $100 credit per new Codex team member (up to $500/team, limited time)

changes.current_state: Pay-as-you-go token-based pricing, Business $20/user/mo (annual), Codex-only seats with usage-based billing, $100 new member credits

changes.summary: Premium request model introduced across all tiers. Free: 50/mo, Pro: 300, Pro+: 1,500, Business: 300/user, Enterprise: 1,000/user. Overage at $0.04/request. Advanced reasoning models consume 5x-20x per interaction

changes.current_state: Premium request quotas per tier with $0.04 overage. Model multipliers (5x-20x) for advanced reasoning models

changes.current_state: Grandfathered Pro at $15/mo indefinitely. All plans use daily/weekly quota system

changes.current_state: Metered billing at $0.003-$0.005 per query with $5 prepaid minimum. No free plan. Credit card required, no spending cap

changes.summary: Free tier replaced with pay-per-use + $10 one-time credit

changes.current_state: Spotify Premium subscription required for dev mode, 5 test users max, multiple endpoints deprecated

changes.summary: Free access ended after 10+ years. Annual fee of $1,400/year started January 31. Per-call fees begin April 30: $0.40 per 1,000 GET calls above tier allowance. Tiered model: Basic (2.5M free GET calls/month), Pro ($1K/mo, 25M calls), Plus ($10K/mo, 250M calls), Enterprise (custom). Private apps (sellers/vendors using SP-API for own business) are exempt.

changes.current_state: $1,400/year + tiered per-call fees. Basic: 2.5M free GET calls/mo, Pro: $1K/mo (25M calls), Plus: $10K/mo (250M calls). $0.40/1K overage. Private apps exempt

changes.summary: $5 Hacker tier eliminated, features merged into free and higher tiers

changes.current_state: Free tier and $10/mo+ paid tiers only, Hacker tier removed

changes.current_state: Pro free tier removed. Flash reduced to 10 RPM (~20-50 RPD). Flash-Lite 15 RPM. 50-80% reduction across the board. Gemini 2.0 Flash retiring March 2026

changes.summary: Restructured to credit-based pricing; sites pause on credit exhaustion
changes.previous_state: Traditional tiered pricing with fixed monthly allowances
changes.current_state: 300 credits/month free, sites pause on exhaustion

changes.current_state: All repo committers to connected private repos count as Pro seats ($19/mo each) when using CMS or Identity features

changes.summary: Project pause policy tightened — inactive projects now pause after 1 week
changes.previous_state: Longer inactivity window before project pause
changes.current_state: Projects pause after 1 week of inactivity on free tier

changes.summary: Queues added to Workers free plan — message queuing now free
changes.previous_state: Queues was paid-only
changes.current_state: Queues included in free Workers plan

changes.summary: Self-hosted runner per-minute fee ($0.002/min) announced for March 2026 was postponed indefinitely after community backlash. Self-hosted runners remain free. Separately, hosted runner prices were reduced up to 39% (Jan 2026)

changes.current_state: Self-hosted runners remain free — no orchestration fees. Hosted runners 39% cheaper. GitHub re-evaluating self-hosted pricing approach

changes.summary: Launched free tier for MCP Web Server — 5,000 requests/month for agent developers

changes.current_state: 5,000 free monthly requests on Rapid mode, includes search_engine and scrape_as_markdown tools, handles JS rendering and CAPTCHAs

changes.current_state: Managed Payments acts as Merchant of Record in 75+ countries, handling sales tax/VAT/GST, fraud prevention, dispute resolution, and transaction-level support

changes.current_state: Spans-based metrics: Developer plan includes 50K errors + 10M spans/month free. Reserved volume pricing replaces on-demand

changes.current_state: Free tier: 0.5 GB per project (up to 5 GB across 100 projects), 100 CU-hours/month per project, 10 branches/project, Neon Auth 60K MAU, auto-scaling up to 2 CU, scale-to-zero

changes.current_state: 15% standard list increase, 18-40% for legacy Advantaged pricing tiers. No new DC licenses after March 30, 2026. Full DC end-of-life March 2029

changes.current_state: Pro $9/user/month, Team $15/user/month. Free: 1 private repo (2GB), 1 Scout repo, no Build Cloud minutes, 40 pulls/hour

changes.current_state: Scale AI Tier: up to $350K GCP credits ($250K year 1, $100K year 2). Standard: $200K. Partner credits: $10K Anthropic/Claude via Model Garden, Fireworks AI, MongoDB Atlas, CockroachDB, 1yr free GitLab Ultimate

changes.summary: EC2 Capacity Blocks for ML GPU prices increased ~15% across regions. p5e.48xlarge went from $34.61 to $39.80/hr (US East) and $43.26 to $49.75/hr (US West N. California)

changes.current_state: Free and Go tiers show contextual ads (labeled 'sponsored') below responses. Plus/Pro/Business/Enterprise/Education tiers remain ad-free. Users can opt out at cost of reduced daily message limits

changes.previous_state: Per-seat monthly subscription
changes.current_state: Credit-based consumption model with usage tiers

changes.current_state: Daily/weekly quotas replace credits. Pro $20/mo (existing subs grandfathered at $15), Ultimate $40/mo, Team $200/mo/seat. Free tier gets limited daily completions and chat messages

changes.current_state: Free plan with up to 4 ACUs per cluster, 1 GB storage, $100–200 in credits for new accounts

changes.summary: Amazon Kiro AI coding assistant launched GA with tiered credit-based pricing: Free tier (50 credits/month), Pro ($20/month, 1,000 credits), Pro+ ($40/month, 2,000 credits). Credits metered to 0.01 increments, model-dependent rates.
changes.previous_state: Preview-only access, no public pricing
changes.current_state: Free tier: 50 credits/month. Pro: $20/month (1,000 credits). Pro+: $40/month (2,000 credits). GA availability

changes.summary: Replit Core plan dropped from $25/month to $20/month (now includes 5 collaborators). New Pro plan added at $100/month with Agent modes, tiered credits, and up to 15 builders. Teams plan sunset (auto-migrated to Pro). Free tier unchanged (limited AI credits, basic compute)
changes.previous_state: Free tier + Core plan at $25/month + Teams plan
changes.current_state: Free tier + Core plan at $20/month (5 collaborators) + Pro plan at $100/month (15 builders). Teams plan sunset

changes.summary: SonarQube Cloud introduced more granular Team tier pricing with differentiated feature access. Free tier for open-source projects remains. Paid tiers restructured for clearer scaling path from small teams to enterprise
changes.previous_state: Free (open source) + Developer + Enterprise tiers
changes.current_state: Free (open source) + Team (granular tiers) + Enterprise. More pricing options for mid-size teams

changes.summary: Cursor introduced Pro+ tier at $60/month between Pro ($20) and Ultra ($200). Pro+ includes 10x premium model requests vs Pro, priority access, and expanded context window. Expands the pricing ladder from 3 tiers (Free/Pro/Ultra) to 4 (Free/Pro/Pro+/Ultra), filling the $20-$200 gap.
changes.previous_state: 3-tier pricing: Free (2K completions, 50 slow requests), Pro $20/mo (unlimited completions, 500 fast requests), Ultra $200/mo
changes.current_state: 4-tier pricing: Free (2K completions, 50 slow requests), Pro $20/mo, Pro+ $60/mo (10x premium requests, priority access, more context), Ultra $200/mo

changes.summary: Gemini API free tier restricted to Flash and Flash-Lite models only (April 2026). Gemini 2.5 Pro and other Pro models now require a paid billing account. Previously free users could access Pro models with rate limits. Combined with April 1 spend cap enforcement, this significantly narrows what is available at $0.
changes.previous_state: Free tier included access to both Flash and Pro models with rate limits. Gemini 2.5 Pro accessible to free users at reduced rates
changes.current_state: Free tier restricted to Flash and Flash-Lite models only. Pro models (Gemini 2.5 Pro) require paid billing account. Free users limited to lighter-weight models

changes.summary: OVHcloud VPS prices increased dramatically April 1, 2026. VPS Starter (VPS-1) from $4.90 to $7.60/mo (+55%), VPS Essential (VPS-2) similarly increased, VPS Comfort (VPS-4) from $26.00 to $43.50/mo (+67%). Root cause: AI-driven DRAM prices up 250-300% and NVMe SSD costs surging. Affects all new and existing VPS customers.
changes.current_state: VPS-1 $7.60/mo (+55%), VPS-4 $43.50/mo (+67%). All VPS tiers increased 30-67%. New and existing customers affected

changes.summary: Amazon SP-API per-call fees (originally April 30, 2026) postponed indefinitely following widespread developer backlash. The $1,400/year annual fee (started Jan 31) remains in effect, but per-call GET fees ($0.40/1K calls above tier allowance) have no new implementation date. Amazon cited "additional feedback" from developer community as reason for delay.
changes.previous_state: Free API access for registered Amazon developers with standard rate limits
changes.current_state: $1,400/year annual fee active (since Jan 31). Per-call fees postponed indefinitely — no new date announced. Basic/Pro/Plus/Enterprise tiers defined but overage charges not yet enforced. Private apps remain exempt

changes.summary: Amazon Kiro launched GA with a free tier of 50 credits/month. Claude-powered IDE focused on spec-driven development. Pro $20/mo (1,000 credits), Pro+ $40/mo (2,000), Power $200/mo (10,000). Credits metered to 0.01 increments, model-dependent rates. $0.04 overage per credit. Enterprise tier available.
changes.previous_state: Preview/beta with limited access
changes.current_state: GA with free tier (50 credits/mo). Four paid tiers: Pro ($20), Pro+ ($40), Power ($200). Enterprise: custom pricing

changes.summary: DALL-E 2 and DALL-E 3 API access discontinued. Developers must migrate to gpt-image-1 (different pricing model, quality tiers changed from standard/hd to low/medium/high) or switch to free alternatives like Pollinations.AI or Lumenfall.ai

changes.current_state: DALL-E 2 & 3 API shut down. Replacement: gpt-image-1 at $0.011-$0.167/image with new quality tiers

changes.summary: Realtime API beta endpoints deprecated. Developers must remove OpenAI-Beta header, use new client_secrets endpoint, specify session_type, and update event names. GA Realtime API is the direct replacement.

changes.current_state: Realtime API GA: no beta header, POST /v1/realtime/client_secrets for ephemeral keys, session_type required (speech-to-speech or transcription), updated event names

changes.summary: Three material policy changes: (1) Third-party tool restrictions — external tools like OpenClaw now billed separately on pay-as-you-go, can no longer apply standard usage limits. (2) Extra usage option — all paid plans (Pro, Max 5x, Max 20x) have pay-as-you-go overage at standard API rates. (3) Peak-hour throttling (acknowledged March 31) — 5-hour session limits reduced during weekdays 5 AM–11 AM Pacific.
changes.previous_state: Flat subscription pricing with included usage limits. Third-party tools shared standard limits. No overage option.
changes.current_state: Subscription + pay-as-you-go overage. Third-party tools billed separately. Peak-hour throttling during weekday mornings.

changes.summary: Kiro pricing model clarified: uses credits (not interactions). Credits metered to 0.01 increments, model-dependent rates (Sonnet 4 costs 1.3x more than Auto). $0.04/credit overage (disabled by default). 500 bonus credits for new users (30 days). Enterprise tier with SAML/SCIM SSO. GovCloud ~20% premium, no free tier in GovCloud.
changes.previous_state: GA pricing listed as interaction-based
changes.current_state: Credit-based pricing with 0.01 granularity. Enterprise tier. GovCloud availability at premium.

changes.summary: AWS Startups offers up to 1 year of free Kiro Pro+ (worth $480/year). Three tiers: Starter (up to 2 users), Growth (up to 50 users), Scale (up to 100 users). Eligible: early-stage to Series B companies.

changes.current_state: Up to 1 year free Kiro Pro+ via AWS Startups, up to 100 users
